objectives: Understand the fundamental concepts of machine learning.
Learn how to implement basic machine learning algorithms using Python.
Explore data preprocessing techniques in Python.
learning_path.title: Introduction to Machine Learning with Python

objectives: Develop skills in creating data processing applications.
Learn to clean, transform, and prepare data for machine learning models.
Apply Python for efficient data manipulation.
prerequisites: Introduction to Machine Learning with Python
learning_path.title: Data Processing and Preparation for Machine Learning

objectives: Grasp essential statistical concepts relevant to machine learning.
Understand how statistics inform model selection and evaluation.
Apply statistical methods using Python.
prerequisites: Introduction to Machine Learning with Python
learning_path.title: Statistical Foundations for Machine Learning

objectives: Learn the core concepts and architecture of TensorFlow.
Build and train neural networks using TensorFlow.
Understand how to use TensorFlow for various machine learning tasks.
prerequisites: Introduction to Machine Learning with Python
Data Processing and Preparation for Machine Learning
learning_path.title: Deep Dive into TensorFlow for Machine Learning

objectives: Understand the fundamentals of PyTorch for deep learning.
Implement and train neural networks using PyTorch.
Compare and contrast PyTorch with other deep learning frameworks.
prerequisites: Introduction to Machine Learning with Python
Data Processing and Preparation for Machine Learning
learning_path.title: Exploring PyTorch for Machine Learning

objectives: Design and implement complex data processing pipelines.
Optimize data processing applications for performance.
Integrate data processing with machine learning workflows.
prerequisites: Data Processing and Preparation for Machine Learning
learning_path.title: Advanced Data Processing Applications

objectives: Apply advanced statistical techniques for data analysis.
Perform hypothesis testing and confidence interval estimation.
Interpret statistical results in the context of machine learning.
learning_path.title: Statistical Modeling and Inference

objectives: Develop end-to-end machine learning solutions using TensorFlow.
Learn techniques for model optimization and deployment.
Apply programming best practices in TensorFlow projects.
prerequisites: Deep Dive into TensorFlow for Machine Learning
learning_path.title: Building and Deploying Machine Learning Models with TensorFlow

objectives: Implement complex neural network architectures in PyTorch.
Explore advanced training techniques and optimization strategies.
Integrate PyTorch models into larger programming projects.
learning_path.title: Advanced PyTorch for Deep Learning

objectives: Apply learned skills in machine learning, Python, statistics, and deep learning frameworks to a real-world problem.
Develop a complete machine learning solution from data processing to model evaluation.
Utilize programming and data processing application development skills.
prerequisites: Building and Deploying Machine Learning Models with TensorFlow
learning_path.title: Integrated Machine Learning Project

matched_occupation.description: Computer vision engineers research, design, develop, and train artificial intelligence algorithms and machine learning primitives that understand the content of digital images based on a large amount of data. They apply this understanding to solve different real-world problems such as security, autonomous driving, robotic manufacturing, digital image classification, medical image processing and diagnosis, etc.
matched_occupation.label: computer vision engineer
